scenes.text:
Your brain does not know the
difference between real and imagined.

Neuroscience proved that repeating a thought for twenty-one days creates a new neural pathway. That means every negative story you tell yourself is just
a well-worn path in your brain. The good news is you can build new ones. Visualization is not woo woo. It is brain science.

Spend ten minutes every morning seeing yourself as the person you want to
become. Feel it. Believe it. Your brain will start building the roadmap.

Your thoughts are blueprints. Your brain is
the construction crew. Give it better plans.

Save this and start your twenty-one day challenge
today. Follow for the science of success.
